svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="6y8wYQCntdhG-fidohYm" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-404" dy="-93" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="760" pageHeight="320" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="图：BatchNorm —— 按通道归一化，再缩放平移" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="700" x="30" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xin" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="x
（某通道 · 整批数据）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="120" x="36" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="norm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="① 归一化
x̂ = (x − μ) / √(σ² + ε)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="210" x="196" y="96" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="norm_a" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#777777;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="μ, σ²：训练用本批统计；推理用 running 统计" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="230" x="186" y="184" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scale" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="② 缩放平移
y = γ · x̂ + β" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="170" x="450" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scale_a" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#777777;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="γ, β：可学习参数（初值 γ=1, β=0）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="190" x="440" y="174" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yout" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="y" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="60" x="664" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="xin" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="norm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="norm" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="scale"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="scale" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="yout"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="作用：把每个通道拉回均值≈0、方差≈1，稳住各层分布、加速收敛，并降低对初始化和学习率的敏感；γ、β 再让网络按需缩放平移。训练用当前 batch 统计量，推理改用训练期累积的 running 均值/方差。Conv→BN：BN 第一步就减均值，会抵消 conv 的 bias，所以前面的 conv 设 bias=False。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="700" x="30" y="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 360px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 图：BatchNorm —— 按通道归一化，再缩放平移

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 136px; margin-left: 17px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 136px; margin-left: 177px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① 归一化
x̂ = (x − μ) / √(σ² + ε)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 189px; margin-left: 281px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #777777;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#777777, #878787); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: μ, σ²：训练用本批统计；推理用 running 统计

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 168px; height: 1px; padding-top: 136px; margin-left: 431px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② 缩放平移
y = γ · x̂ + β

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 179px; margin-left: 515px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #777777;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#777777, #878787); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: γ, β：可学习参数（初值 γ=1, β=0）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 58px; height: 1px; padding-top: 136px; margin-left: 645px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));
fill: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 252px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 作用：把每个通道拉回均值≈0、方差≈1，稳住各层分布、加速收敛，并降低对初始化和学习率的敏感；γ、β 再让网络按需缩放平移。训练用当前 batch 统计量，推理改用训练期累积的 running 均值/方差。Conv→BN：BN 第一步就减均值，会抵消 conv 的 bias，所以前面的 conv 设 bias=False。
